source: Neptune Star Schema Knowledge Graph — hourly generation

alerts.recommendation:
ROOT CAUSE
Return rate is 900.0% above baseline at Manhattan Flagship. Product quality or expectation mismatches are driving excess returns.

IMMEDIATE ACTIONS
• Audit top returned SKUs for quality or description inaccuracies
• Tighten return policy enforcement for non-defective items
• Add product Q&A and size guides to reduce expectation gaps

STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS
• Implement pre-shipment quality checks for flagged categories
• Track return reason codes and feed back to buying team

LOSS PREVENTION
Excess returns will cost $40,779 in 90 days if unaddressed.

ROOT CAUSE
Discount rate is 136.3% above baseline at Manhattan Flagship. Promotions are being applied too broadly, eroding net revenue.

IMMEDIATE ACTIONS
• Cap stackable promotions — disable overlapping discount combinations
• Restrict discount eligibility to top loyalty tiers only
• Set a per-transaction discount ceiling of 15%

STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS
• Redesign promotion calendar to space discount events 3+ weeks apart
• Shift to personalised offers based on customer loyalty tier

LOSS PREVENTION
Excess discounting will cost $4,632 in 90 days.
Net sales are above baseline at Manhattan Flagship — store performance is strong. Maintain current inventory levels and staffing to sustain momentum.
Return rate is below baseline at LA Downtown — product quality and customer satisfaction are strong. Sustain current quality controls.

ROOT CAUSE
Average order value is 55.4% below baseline at LA Downtown. Customers are purchasing fewer items per visit.

IMMEDIATE ACTIONS
• Launch bundle promotions linking top categories at checkout
• Retrain staff on upsell scripts targeting loyalty-tier customers
• Activate minimum-spend promotions to lift basket size

STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS
• Introduce loyalty-tier AOV targets — reward customers exceeding monthly spend thresholds
• Analyse category affinity data for personalised cross-sell recommendations

LOSS PREVENTION
An AOV shortfall of 55.4% costs $389 over 90 days.
Discount rate is below baseline at LA Downtown — promotions are well-controlled. Monitor to ensure discount reduction is not suppressing conversion rates.

ROOT CAUSE
Net sales at LA Downtown are 51.9% below the cross-store baseline. Key categories and customer segments are underperforming.

IMMEDIATE ACTIONS
• Launch a flash promotion on top categories this week
• Activate email/push campaigns targeting loyalty-tier customers in West
• Review stock levels — stockouts may be suppressing sales

STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS
• Benchmark LA Downtown against top-performing peer stores for staffing and layout differences
• Run a targeted local marketing campaign for the store's catchment area

LOSS PREVENTION
Continued underperformance will result in a $607 revenue gap over 90 days.

ROOT CAUSE
Gross Margin % is 29.7% below baseline at Manhattan Flagship. Product mix or supplier costs are compressing margins.

IMMEDIATE ACTIONS
• Review pricing on low-margin SKUs and apply margin floor rules
• Renegotiate supplier contracts for top-selling categories
• Shift promotions to higher-margin product lines

STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS
• Introduce margin-based category targets reviewed monthly
• Analyse product mix vs. top-performing peer stores

LOSS PREVENTION
Continued margin compression costs $897 over 90 days.
